personas.name: Consistent Mood Tracker
personas.description: A user who actively uses the app to track their mood and emotions, and finds it helpful in managing their mental health.
context: uses the app daily or frequently
relies on the app for reflection
constraints: tracking should be easy and quick
personas.notes: Refined persona name and other information to match with the hybrid groups exactly.

personas.name: Reliability focused User
personas.description: A user who depends on the app but becomes frustrated when technical issues arise.
personas.notes: Changed persona name and some pain points to be more specific and have more explanation to make it more understandable.

personas.name: Budget conscious User
personas.description: A user who wants to benefit from the app but is frustrated by paywalls and limited free features.
context: uses free digital tools for support
constraints: needs access to core features without paying
personas.notes: Changed persona to match more with the hybrid group it is representing. Changed and used specific paint points, goalls and constraints related to the theme.

personas.name: Mental Health Support User
personas.description: A user who uses the app to improve emotional awareness and support their mental health journey.
context: may be dealing with anxiety or depression
uses the app for reflection or support
constraints: insights should be useful and clear
features should support mental health improvement
personas.notes: Changed persona name to be more easy to understand and trace to group, removed any repeating sentences in goals, paint points or context that was not related to the persona.

personas.name: Trust seeking User
personas.description: A user who is skeptical of the apps claims and concerned about trust or credibility.
goals: use a trustworthy mental health tool
pain_points: lack of trust in app recommendations
personas.notes: Chagned the persona name and details to match more with the hybrid group and clarified some points relating to the persona
